findings.evidence: snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:121 commits the chapter's decisive turn, but snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:123, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:125, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:129, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:141, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:145 keep restating the same school-routine-versus-cosmic-threat contrast instead of adding a fresh turn.
findings.problem: The chapter lands its strongest beat when Gavin decides to stop waiting and devote himself to the ward work, then overruns that beat with an extended exit that repeats the already-established contrast between ordinary morning life and the failing wards. The ending stays competent, but it no longer sharpens the chapter's impact; it diffuses it.
findings.rewrite_direction: Tighten or restructure the ending run beginning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:123 and closing at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:145. Either cut one of the recap passes or replace part of that descent with a fresh consequence beat on the page: a concealment choice, a physical failure, or a social cost that Gavin incurs because of the decision he makes at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:121.
findings.acceptance_test: After the resolve at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:121, the revised ending must introduce at least one new consequence that was not already present in the inventory/grief sequence at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:113 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:119. If the last paragraph still pairs school routine with the thinning wards, that pairing must now be carried by a new on-page cost or choice rather than another atmospheric recap.

findings.evidence: snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:13, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:33, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:123, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:127, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:137 all lean on the literal word 'specific'; snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:19, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:57, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:59, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:115, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:119 repeat the same fragment-and-negation emphasis pattern ('Not X. Y.').
findings.problem: The prose starts to sound house-generated rather than discovered in the scene because it repeatedly falls back on style-bible-adjacent wording and the same rhetorical template. 'Specific' becomes a labeling habit instead of actual specificity, and the repeated 'Not X. Y.' fragments flatten the later paragraphs by giving them the same pressure rhythm.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the repeated-template passages at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:13, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:33, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:57, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:59, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:115, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:123, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:127, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:137. Replace the metaword 'specific' with actual differentiating detail or cut it, and break the repeated negation-fragment cadence by converting some of those beats into direct assertions or different sentence shapes.
findings.acceptance_test: Across the revised passages named above, no more than two uses of the literal word 'specific' remain, and no more than two instances of the exact 'Not X. Y.' fragment template remain. Each cited paragraph should read with a distinct cadence that is justified by its local pressure rather than by a reused authorial tic.

findings.evidence: snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:105 opens the school-side half of the chapter, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:107 introduces speaking students, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:129, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:133, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:139, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:141 move Gavin through multiple social spaces without giving him a single spoken line.
findings.problem: The chapter provides no live dialogue evidence for Gavin's public register at the exact moment his priorities harden. Because the back half moves him through student traffic and the Hufflepuff common room, the total absence of speech reads less like a decisive formal choice and more like avoided friction: Gavin's evasive, high-contraction, slightly apologetic spoken voice never gets tested against another person.
findings.rewrite_direction: Add a short exchange during the descent or re-entry, centered around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:129 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:143. Gavin should have to answer someone who notices his state or his slipping schoolwork, and his lines should sound like Gavin's style-bible register: contracted, hedged, slightly apologetic, and at least once self-correcting. The other speaker needs a distinct rhythm and enough pressure to shift the scene's leverage.
findings.acceptance_test: In the revised social span anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:129 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:143, Gavin speaks at least three lines; contractions appear in most of those lines; at least one Gavin line contains a hedge or self-correction; and the other speaker's syntax/rhythm is clearly distinguishable from Gavin's. The exchange must leave a visible pressure trace such as embarrassment, suspicion, or a practical obligation Gavin now has to manage.

summary: Continuity, tense, interiority, and sanitization control are strong: the chapter keeps a close third lock on Gavin, renders the wards and the condition beyond them with bodily specificity, and lands the required state delta cleanly. It still fails overall because the prose leans on mechanical style-bible/token drift and repeated fragment formulas, the dialogue lens has no pass evidence, and the ending keeps re-landing the ordinary-world-versus-cosmic-threat contrast after the decisive beat instead of creating a fresh consequence.
